system.flavor: Each veil is a gate to the underworld. Each revelation more terrifying than the last.
system.effect:
Effect 1
Attack: 1 damage, Hit: +1d3 damage
Weave this ability resolves, deal 2 damage to an adjacent foe, then dash 1 (4+) then deal 2 damage and dash 1, (6+) then deal 2 damage and dash 1, and gain evasion.
